infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Muqabla needs camera access to record your video profile and job applications.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Muqabla needs microphone access to record audio with your videos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Muqabla needs photo library access to upload profile pictures.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Muqabla to access your camera to record videos.
plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Muqabla to access your microphone for video recording.
